text: A black and white car sitting on top of a suitcase.
A large brown elephant standing in the lake
A man throwing a tennis ball in the air swinging at it.
A building with a steeple and a clock.
A serving platter of vegetables is on a table.
An airplane flying through a cloudy blue sky.

A wooden bed frame next to a doorway.
A white and blue wall with a clock depicting a cartoon cow.
